summaries.title: MCP server `local_json_fallback` silently drops lesson data — `withFallback()` must detect it
summaries.summary: The MCP server's `_handleLocalFallback` returns `{success:true, source:"local_json_fallback"}` even though it silently drops lesson data, so `withFallback()` must detect the `source` field and treat `local_json_fallback` as a failure to trigger real local storage and retry queuing. Never trust `success: true` from an upstream component without verifying the `source` field.
